notes: Case docketed in 2021 but appears only as roster entries in GA minutes from 1982-1986. References to Korean Southwest Presbytery found in GA 14 (1986) pages 26-33 showing presbytery roster with churches and teaching elders (e.g., Korean church in Houston, Orange CA, San Jose CA, Sunnyvale CA). No actual judicial decision or opinion text located - only roster/administrative mentions. Likely related to or same as case_id 2016-10 (Korean Language Presbytery establishment), which had substantive discussion in GA 10 (1982).
